content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于5月28日19:50(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年6月11日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【纪念活动：宛如梦幻的相逢】
● 解锁高级纪行可额外获得的奖励追加，总计追加「银芯」×15000、「命途回溯之芯」×1。
    ○ 完成登录一次：追加奖励「银芯」×5000。
    ○ 完成「调查行动-忘却篇-第四章」普通模式：追加奖励「银芯」×5000。
    ○ 完成「多维连接-被遗忘的爱之种」普通模式：追加奖励「银芯」×5000。
    ○ 完成以上所有任务：追加奖励「命途回溯之芯」×1。
● 更新前已领取相关奖励的守密人，将在更新后 24 小时内以邮件形式补发追加的奖励。
 
二、故事
【本地化】
● 英语
    ○ 以下唤醒体的背景故事现已由人工译者提供翻译：奥瑞塔、希洛、菲茵特、萝坦、詹金、卡茜亚、温柯尔、达芙黛尔、尤乌哈希、雷娅、泰旖丝、索蕾尔。
● 韩语
    ○ 「忘却篇」第 1 至第 9 章现已由人工译者提供翻译。
    ○ 唤醒体技能部分文本现已由人工译者提供翻译。
● 俄语
    ○ 根据翻译志愿者提供的术语，优化了现有的翻译措辞。
● 其他
    ○ 优化调整了多个语言中现有翻译中的标点符号、格式表述。
 
三、战斗
【通用】
● 状态「残骸」：调整了描述，明确说明可被「杜勒赛因」的狂气爆发「生灵的盛筵」食用以触发额外效果。
● 状态「忍耐」：战斗内描述增加了「可以继承至下场战斗」的说明。
 
【唤醒体】
● 「希洛」的狂气爆发「绝境求生」的描述，由「打击造成的伤害提高 100%」调整为「打击造成的最终伤害提高 100%」，实际效果不变。
 
【战斗统计（Beta）】
● 「战斗统计」入口现在调整到「调查数据」界面的右下方。
● 以下各处的「调查数据」界面中，现在也可以查看对应的「战斗统计」。
    ○ 「守密人档案-战斗记录-调查行动」。
    ○ 「调查行动-关卡详情-通关记录」。
    ○ 「幻梦深潜」、「融灾禁区」、「记忆回廊」的排行榜。
 
【相位对弈】
● 唤醒体「阿拉克涅」
    ○ 技能「纺织」：伤害从 4 降低为 3。
    ○ 技能「预言」：现在会在打出卡牌后立即变化，而不是等行动结束时变化，实际效果不变。
● 唤醒体「达芙黛尔」
    ○ 技能「千面重叠」：算力消耗从 1 提高为 2，伤害从 12 提高为 16，成长从 3 提高为 4。
    ○ 技能「维度追猎」：算力消耗从 2 降低为 1，卡牌封锁从 15 降低为 10。
● 命轮「坠入虚无的人偶」
    ○ 现在不会对友方施加「空虚」。
    ○ 现在「坠入虚无的人偶」受到致死伤害时不再对敌方施加「空虚」，与「反击」类似。
    ○ 现在「坠入虚无的人偶」处于可触发状态时，会显示一个状态提示其正在生效。
● 命轮「樱花下的迷思」
    ○ 现在「樱花下的迷思」赋予的状态「一期一会」不会在一回合内多次触发时叠加。
 
四、综合
【密境课室】
● 银辉之路
    ○ 界面下方增加了说明「注意：顺序仅代表推荐阅读顺序，不代表严格时间顺序。」
【源液提取】
● 使用部分设备游玩「源液提取」无法支付时，现在会弹出操作指引提示。
 
五、问题修复
【活动】
● 修复了大厅「活动」入口图片不会自动切换的问题。
● 修复了命轮纪行「樱庭茶会」中，查看命轮详情时，详情界面会错误地自动关闭的问题。
● 修复了纪念活动「宛如梦幻的相逢」中，购买高级纪行后额外奖励的可领取提示特效丢失的问题。
 
【故事】
● 本地化
    ○ 简体中文
        ■ 修复了「学期课题」规则说明等部分文本中，「无垢之芯」被误写为「无垢之心」的问题。
        ■ 修复了「幻梦深潜」本赛季强化唤醒体的详细信息中，「本赛季」被误写为「本周」的问题。
        ■ 修复了「教程-禁忌纂录」的说明文本中「通过」被误写为「通关」的问题。
        ■ 修复了「唤醒记录」中「命轨合契·三倍唤醒」被误写为「循序命理·三倍唤醒」的问题。
        ■ 修复了修改守密人名称以及编辑队伍名称时，非法字符提示文本中标点错误的问题。
    ○ 繁体中文
        ■ 修复了「相位对弈」战斗中，命轮「女王的戒律」装备后在角色详细信息的描述内效果数值未能显示的问题。
        ■ 修复了「相位对弈」战斗中，唤醒体「希洛」的狂气爆发「绝境求生」描述内的效果数值未能显示的问题。
        ■ 修复了唤醒体「24」的个别技能和状态描述等部分文本中，「24」被错误地翻译为「内森·格林基金会」的问题。
    ○ 英语
        ■ 修复了部分唤醒体的「灵塑适性」描述中出现重复文本的问题。
        ■ 修复了部分技能描述措辞不规范、效果数值未能显示的问题。

【综合】
● 课题纪录
    ○ 修复了「课题礼匣」中无法选择「流明之芯」×5 奖励的问题。
        ■ 更新前选择了溢出命轮而获得「命途回溯碎片」的守密人，将在更新后 24 小时内以邮件形式发放「流明之芯」×5 的补偿。
        ■ 其他购买了「高阶课题」且课题等级达到 40 级的守密人，将在本期课题纪录结束后 24 小时内，以邮件形式发放「命途回溯碎片」×1 的补偿。
● 大厅
    ○ 修复了守密人头像右侧的经验数值较大时，可能出现的等级与经验数字重叠的问题。
● 物资
    ○ 修复了对命轮进行叠位后，返回「物资」界面改为按叠位排序时，命轮排序错误的问题。
    ○ 修复了某些情况下，命轮详细信息中描述文字会错误地变暗的问题。
    ○ 修复了「空幻之芯」的限时标记会错误地显示在界面最上层的问题。
    ○ 修复了领取「特批药剂」奖励时，若「灵啡肽」达到上限 3000，会错误地弹出「灵啡肽溢出」提示的问题。
● 唤醒
    ○ 修复了唤醒活动「夙愿的回响」中，部分守密人在尚未获得本期 UP 时，已连续获取本期 UP 的计数显示错误的问题。
● 幕间演习
    ○ 修复了在「禁忌纂录」中挑战胜利后返回「幕间演习」时会错误地回到「融蚀之墟」的问题。修复后会回到「禁忌纂录」界面，并保持选中此前挑战的关卡。
● 守密纪行
    ○ 修复了完成全部纪行后，点击「守密纪行」缺少相关提示的问题。
● 秘典书库
    ○ 修复了「秘典书库」编辑评论时，某些情况下评论文本会超出输入框的问题。
    ○ 修复了「秘典书库」评论中部分语言的文字排版错乱的问题。
● 学籍档案
    ○ 修复了「教程-残片」中描述过时的问题。
● 助战
    ○ 修复了互相关注的校友超过 75 名时，「选择助战」列表在「刷新」后未能刷新的问题。
    ○ 修复了使用近期未在线守密人的非常驻唤醒体助战时，「内在灵格」天赋未生效的问题。
● 信箱
    ○ 修复了邮件的「删除」按钮背景和文字显示位置不正确的问题。
● 校友会
    ○ 修复了「校友会」中部分守密人的在线信息会错误地显示为「56年前在线」的问题。
● 兼容性
    ○ 修复了使用 PC 游玩时，部分情况下按 ESC 键无法呼出「退出游戏」窗口的问题。

**V2.5.1.3 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on May 28 at 19:50(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on June 11, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update Content]
1. Event
[Commemorative Event: Dreamy Rendezvous]
● Unlocking Premium Archives grants additional rewards, totaling "Silver" ×15000 and "Fate Rewind Core" ×1.
    ○ Complete 1 Login: Bonus Reward "Silver" ×5000.
    ○ Complete "Investigation-Faded Legacy-Chapter 4" Normal Mode: Additional Reward "Silver" ×5000.
    ○ Complete "Multiverse Link-Forgotten Seed of Love" Normal Mode: Additional Reward "Silver" ×5000.
    ○ Complete all of the above tasks: Bonus reward "Fate Rewind Core" ×1.
● Keepers who have already claimed the relevant rewards before the update will receive the additional rewards via in-game mail within 24 hours after the update.

II. Story
[Localization]
● English
    ○ The backstories for the following Awakeners have been translated by human translators: Aurita, Helot, Faint, Lotan, Jenkin, Casiah, Winkle, Daffodil, Uvhash, Leigh, Thais, Sorel.
● Korean
    ○ "Faded Legacy" Chapters 1 through 9 are now translated by human translators.
    ○ Some text for Awakener Skills has now been translated by human translators.
● Russian
    ○ Optimized existing translation wording based on terminology provided by volunteer translators.
● Other
    ○ Optimized and adjusted punctuation marks and formatting expressions in existing translations across multiple languages.

3. Combat
[General]
● State "Corpse": Adjusted the description to clarify that it can be consumed by "Doresain's" Aliemus Burst "Necrotic Gala" to trigger additional Effects.
● State "Endure": Added "Can be carried over to the next battle" to the in-battle description.

[Awakener]
● The description of "Helot"'s Exalt "Surviving Impasse" has been updated from "Strike DMG Boost 100%" to "Strike Final DMG Boost 100%", with no change to the actual Effect.

[Combat Stats (Beta)]
● The "Combat Stats" entry has been moved to the bottom-right of the "Survey Data" screen.
● The "Battle Stats" can now also be viewed in the "Survey Data" screen in the following locations.
    ○ "Keeper's Archives - Combat Record - Investigation".
    ○ "Investigation Operation-Stage Details-Clear Record".
    ○ Leaderboards for "Phantasmal Dive," "D-Effect Zone," and "Arcade."

[Traphase]
● Awakener "Arachne"
    ○ Skill "Weave": DMG reduced from 4 to 3.
    ○ Skill "Prophecy": Now changes immediately after playing a Card, rather than waiting until the end of the Operation. The actual Effect remains the same.
● Awakener "Daffodil"
    ○ Skill "Visages Overlay": Arithmetica Cost increased from 1 to 2, DMG increased from 12 to 16, scaling increased from 3 to 4.
    ○ Skill "Dimension Pursuit": Arithmetica Cost reduced from 2 to 1, Card lock reduced from 15 to 10.
● Wheel of Destiny "Manikin of Oblivion"
    ○ No longer inflicts "Void" on allies.
    ○ "Manikin of Oblivion" no longer inflicts "Void" on enemies when receiving lethal DMG, similar to "Counter".
    ○ Now when "Manikin of Oblivion" is in a triggerable state, a State will be displayed hinting that it is in effect.
● Wheel of Destiny "Sakura Reveries"
    ○ The State "Ichigo Ichie" granted by "Sakura Reveries" will no longer stack when triggered multiple times within the same turn.

4. General
[Handbook]
● Argent Journey
    ○ Added a note at the bottom of the interface: "Note: The order represents the recommended reading order only and does not indicate a strict chronological order."
[Prime Extraction]
● When playing "Prime Extraction" on certain devices, a guidance hint will now pop up when payment cannot be processed.

5. Bug Fixes
[Event]
● Fixed an issue where the "Events" entry image in the lobby would not switch automatically.
● Fixed an issue in the Wheel of Destiny Chronicle "Blossom Court" where the details screen would incorrectly close automatically when viewing Wheel of Destiny details.
● Fixed an issue in the commemorative event "Dreamy Rendezvous" where the Claimable: hint effect for bonus rewards after purchasing the Premium Archives was missing.

[Story]
● Localization
    ○ Simplified Chinese
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Pure Core" was incorrectly written as "Pure Heart" in certain text, including the "Curriculum" rule description.
        ■ Fixed an issue in "Phantasmal Dive" where the current season's Awakener enhancement details incorrectly displayed "This Week" instead of "This Season."
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Clear" was incorrectly written as "pass" in the description text of "Tutorial - Verboten Covenant".
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Fate Covenant: Triple Awaken" in the "Awaken Record" was mistakenly written as "Chronos Mandate: Triple Awaken."
        ■ Fixed an issue where punctuation errors appeared in the illegal character Hint text when modifying the Keeper's name or editing the team name.
    ○ Traditional Chinese
        ■ Fixed an issue in "Traphase" battles where the Effect values in the character detail description failed to display after equipping the Wheel of Destiny "Queen's Edict".
        ■ Fixed an issue in "Traphase" combat where the Effect values in the Exalt "Surviving Impasse" description of the Awakener "Helot" were not displaying correctly.
        ■ Fixed an issue where "24" was incorrectly translated as "Nathan Green Foundation" in certain skill and State descriptions of the Awakener "24".
    ○ English
        ■ Fixed an issue where duplicate text appeared in the "Soulforge Aptitude" description of certain Awakeners.
        ■ Fixed an issue where some skill descriptions had improper wording and Effect values were not displaying correctly.

[Combat]
● General
    ○ Fixed an issue where some Affix descriptions were inconsistent with their icon colors, such as "Creativity", "Resonance", "Life Seal", "Aftershock", etc. After the fix, the descriptions are easier to read.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Card "Ichigo Ichie" was incorrectly displaying the "Eternal Loom" Affix.
● Realm
    ○ Chaos Realm
        ■ Fixed an issue in the Chaos Realm where the Effect description for "Aequor Symbiosis" stated "Base Tentacle DMG Boost equal to 1% of Max HP" but was incorrectly written as "0.01%". The description now matches the actual Effect.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the STR▼ Effect applied by the Chaos Realm "Ultra Symbiosis" Effect was incorrectly displayed as active for the current Exploration; it now correctly displays as active for the current battle.
    ○ Ultra Realm
        ■ Fixed an issue where the "Singularity: Ultra" Realm would incorrectly reduce the Maximum Hand Size after entering "Ultra Space".
● Awakener

○ Chaos Realm
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Ogier's" Over-Exaltation displayed incorrect Strength values, and updated the description to "Gain Temporary STR."
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Ogier's" Absolute Axiom incorrectly enhanced the Rouse effect. After the fix: The Strength gained when playing a Card is additionally increased by 50%, consistent with the "Awakener Enhance" description in the V2.5.1.0 update announcement.
        ■ Fixed an issue where Ramona's skill "Assault Thesis" incorrectly displayed the "Strength" Affix.
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Lily's" Soulforge Aptitude "Lily's Strike Final DMG Boost" Effect was incorrectly multiplicatively stacking with the Awakener "Helot's" Aliemus Burst "Surviving Impasse" "Strike Final DMG Boost" Effect; it now additively stacks.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Soulforge Aptitude "Lily's Strike Final DMG Boost" Effect of "Lily" and the Final DMG Effect of the Wheel of Destiny "Twisted Knight Ballad" were incorrectly calculated as additive; they will now be calculated as multiplicative.
        ■ Fixed an issue where, after "Winkle" activated Enlighten "Dread of the Darkness", the Counter Bonus values displayed incorrectly for "Basic Strike" and "Energy Beam".
    ○ Aequor Realm
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Tulu" Tentacle Attack Effects could not stack after unleashing Over-Exaltation twice in a single turn. After the fix, turn counts now stack.
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Miryam's" Gnosis Rouse "Heretical Faith," after selecting "Revelate Devotion," failed to correctly gain Tentacle DMG.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Effect of "Murphy: Fauxborn"'s "Absolute Axiom" gaining "Life Seal" at the end of a round would incorrectly carry over to the next battle.
        ■ Fixed an issue where Vortice's Exalt "Abyssal! Vortex! Cannon!" incorrectly displayed triple DMG to the enemy with the highest HP in combat when Enlighten 3 was not activated. The actual Effect remains unchanged.
    ○ Caro Realm
        ■ Fixed an issue where the DMG value displayed incorrectly in the description of "Salvador's" skill "End of Suffering" when selecting "Liberation."
        ■ Fixed an issue where the "Corpse" Affix in Doresain's Exalt "Necrotic Gala" description was missing its icon.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Talent "Secondary Swaddle" description for "Faint" was unclear.
    ○ Ultra Realm
        ■ Fixed an issue where the Leap description for "Winkle's" skill "Psyche Reforged" was inaccurate. After the fix, the description reads "Instead, gain X Shield."
        ■ Fixed an issue where "Daffodil," after activating Absolute Axiom and Rousing, would have the Arithmetica Cost of "Skull Reaver" placed in Ultra Space reset to 3 in the next battle.
        ■ Fixed an issue where the description of "Liz's" Over-Exaltation "Omen's Descent" was not written clearly.
        ■ Fixed an issue where enabling "Auto Battle" as "Arachne" caused the "Singularity: Ultra" Realm to fail to correctly trigger Ultra Space.

● Posse
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Corpse" Affix in the Posse "Cruel Homage" description was missing its icon.
● Stage
    ○ Fixed an issue in Astral Reign H5-10 where the combat rewards for the first Elite battle were displaying as Normal battle rewards.
    ○ Fixed an issue where certain music segments in the first phase of the "Astral Reign" 5-15 Boss Battle were playing on repeat.
    ○ Fixed an issue where certain music segments in Phase 2 of the "Astral Reign" 5-15 Boss Battle failed to play in some cases.
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Astral Reign" 5-15 Boss Battle Phase 2 where performing a "Time Reversal" turn switch could incorrectly shift the Boss position to the right and cause it to be obscured.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Full Strike" Achievements in Faded Legacy 6-14 and H6-10 could not be completed normally.
    ○ Fixed an issue where Stage Relics in Psyche Deepdive "Passion to Dust," Dreamscape "See You, Neverland," and Multiverse Link "Baptism of Silver and Blood" were incorrectly displayed as "Faded Legacy."
    ○ Fixed an issue in the Special Ops "The Color of Blood" chapter's "Our Failing" where some exploration event points were unresponsive after being clicked.
    ○ Fixed a typo in the skill description of "Puppet Stage Unveiled" for the enemy "Tela Perpetua."
    ○ Fixed an issue where the skill descriptions for "Watering" and "Benefaction" of the enemy "Thorn Attendant" were incorrect; after the fix, the buff target is "To Horla".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the enemy "Sage" would additionally apply an "Echo" Orison to Cards that already had an Orison.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Command Card's Takes effect 1 additional time Effect of the Relic "Dimensional Image·Ramona" would incorrectly also apply to Gnosis Rouse.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the turn count of "Bloodthirsty Flail" in the description of "Crimson Shackles" copied by the Relic "Destiny Spindle" would incorrectly exceed 3.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, when having the Card "Marionette" In Hand, the forced Operation at the Start of the turn would incorrectly prioritize playing Cards with "Retain"; after the fix, the selection is now random.

● Combat Stats (Beta)
    ○ Fixed multiple incorrect name issues in "Combat Stats (Beta)".
        ■ Awakener
            ● "Caecus's" Rouse.
            ● "Corposant's" Gnosis Rouse.
            ● Doresain's Gnosis Rouse.
        ■ Wheel of Destiny: "Birth of a Soul", "Silent Banquet", "Death of Ms. Coral", "Lone Feather", "Navigator at Sea", "Grace Through Pain", "Heart of Silver", "Cloaked in the Night", "Mind Barrier".
        ■ Relic: "Life Breather", "Deceased's Chrono", "Highest Honor", "Sailor Whistle", "Punit Morning Post", "Tiny Music Box", "Truth Unbound", "Chrono Pendulum "Proliferate"", "Chrono Pendulum "Balance"", ""Pure Silver Core·Madness"", "Blessed Blood", "Blessed Blood+", "Radium Jawbone+", "Ritual Dagger", "Ritual Dagger+", "Winner's Cup", "Voyager's Parasol", "Voyager's Parasol+", "Constructed Blessed Blood", "Constructed Blessed Blood+".
        ■ Tentacle Stance: "Tranquil Sea", "Raging Waves".
        ■ Cards: "Onyx Plume", "Envoy's Verdict".
        ■ Card Effect: "Aftershock".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Fixed DMG dealt by Awakener "Lotan"'s Over-Exaltation was not being counted in the statistics.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Card "Envoy's Verdict" was not being tracked correctly.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Battle Stats" of "Hectic Skybound Rail" might incorrectly use battle stats data from the previous Stage.
● Arcade
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Hectic Skybound Rail" where the enemy "Blossom of Sludge"'s State "Lily Rouse" was incorrectly triggering on the second Card played each turn as well.
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Hectic Skybound Rail" where the Interference State "Gradually Breaking Link" applied by the enemy "Sage" would incorrectly carry over to the next battle.
    ○ Fixed an issue in "Hectic Skybound Rail" where various Interference States applied by the enemy "Instrumentalist" would incorrectly carry over to the next battle.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the buff card "Utopian Veil" in "Hectic Skybound Rail" could be used multiple times in non-Boss Battle stages of the third phase.
● Traphase
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Awakener "Caecus"'s Exalt "Bloodline of Heresy" was incorrectly not affected by healing bonuses and debuffs.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Wheel of Destiny "Manikin of Oblivion" would incorrectly continue to take effect after being replaced or "Entwined".
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Posse "The Gated Answer" would incorrectly create 1 extra card.

[General]
● Curriculum
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Luminous Core" ×5 reward could not be selected in "Curriculum Honor".
        ■ Keepers who selected overflow Wheel of Destiny before the update and obtained "Fate Rewind Shard" will receive compensation of Luminous Core ×5 via in-game mail within 24 hours after the update.
        ■ Other Keepers who have purchased "Advanced Topics" and reached Curriculum Level 40 will receive compensation of "Fate Rewind Shard" ×1 via in-game mail within 24 hours after the current Curriculum ends.
● Lobby
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Level and EXP numbers could overlap when the EXP value to the right of the Keeper's portrait was large.
● Supplies
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after Ascending a Wheel of Destiny, returning to the "Supplies" screen and switching to sort by Ascension would result in incorrect sorting of Wheels of Destiny.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the description text in the Wheel of Destiny details would incorrectly dim in certain situations.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the time-limited indicator for "Ethereal Core" would incorrectly display on the topmost layer of the interface.
    ○ Fixed an issue where claiming the "Special Potion Supply" reward would incorrectly trigger a "Menophin Overflow" Hint when "Menophin" reached the cap of 3000.
● Awaken
    ○ Fixed an issue in the Awakening Event "Echoing Wishes" where the count for consecutive UP pulls was incorrectly displayed for some Keepers who had not yet obtained the current UP.
● Interludes
    ○ Fixed an issue where, after winning a challenge in "Verboten Covenant," returning to "Interludes" would incorrectly redirect to "Dissolution Ruins." After the fix, it will return to the "Verboten Covenant" screen with the previously challenged Stage still selected.
● Archives
    ○ Fixed an issue where clicking "Archives" after completing all entries lacked relevant hints.
● Library
    ○ Fixed an issue where comment text could overflow the input box in certain situations when editing comments in the "Library."
    ○ Fixed an issue where text formatting was broken for certain languages in the "Library" reviews.
● Records
    ○ Fixed an outdated description in "Tutorial - Shard."
● Support
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Choose Support" list failed to refresh after "Refresh" when there were more than 75 mutually followed alumni.
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Gnostic Potential" Talent did not take effect when using a non-permanent Awakener Support from a Keeper who had not been online recently.
● Mailbox
    ○ Fixed an issue where the "Delete" button background and text display position in the mail were incorrect.
● Alumni Association
    ○ Fixed an issue where some Keepers' online status in the "Alumni Association" would incorrectly display as "Online 56 years ago."
● Compatibility
    ○ Fixed an issue where pressing the ESC key while playing on PC would sometimes fail to bring up the "Exit Game" window.

但多少還是有點毛病

1.  茉夏打擊終傷跟莉莉打擊終傷兩者不可能存在差異才對，證明製作組某段時間設計前面兩隻角色覺醒/靈塑時，曾經把普希傷害%當是額外乘區，我也不去查哪個先出哪個後出了，反正總不可能一個乘算一個加算

2. 有倒反天罡的疑慮，普希調整後面補了句實際效果不變，但反過來想，是否被用於掩飾削弱角色，畢竟你遊也逐漸開始下放各種終傷乘區了，傷害%跟終傷%價值還是有差距

3. 莉莉傷害算式被修改，損失了傷害，畢竟他們測試數值總不可能是看算法做的，不然早就發現計算問題了，那麼莉莉的傷害本來就是按照互乘後那個數字作為通過測試後的結果產物，本質上數字是正常的，退一步說，如果說他們沒考慮或測試過希洛莉莉配隊，那也是製作組失職

4.莉莉損失的傷害沒有補回來，官方沒考慮彌補這點就明顯欠噴，補強都白補了，如果是怕茉夏吃到額外乘區，還不如給順帶把莉莉打擊終傷改為打擊「傷害%」，跟普希終傷互乘，沒有削弱沒有改變，一樣可以處理問題，現在莫名被砍一刀真是很???

文字描述一直都很模稜兩可，事後處理就是不處理，苦一苦受害者，遇到質疑就裝死，很不負責任那種😫

關於「相位對弈（beta）」的計畫

我們認為相位對弈（beta）主要存在三個問題。

獎勵被迫感強：有豐厚的獎勵並且還有獨有的商店貨幣，以至於大家不得不去遊玩。,
遊戲可用組合少：喚醒體數量過於有限，許多喜愛的角色無法出場，以至於場面和體驗對策都比較單一。,
對策克制樂趣少：目前喚醒體的技能組更多是還原普通模式的技能組，作為整個遊戲的戰術互動克制並不完整。,

對於V1.0相位對弈beta給大家帶來不夠好的體驗，我們非常抱歉！

我們會盡快在先解決第一個問題，取消相位對弈的各項獨有獎勵，獎勵與幻夢深潛完全並軌，讓大家平時只需要在幻夢深潛與相位對弈中選擇自己喜歡的模式即可。

至於剩下兩個問題，我們將大幅度重新設計來解決。但這不會很快到來。在此前，我們會先維持最低限度的平衡與錯誤修復工作。

我曾經遇見過妳。
那天是個下雪的嚴冬，我默默地站在校舍頂樓離邊緣大概三步的地方。
「只要跳下去是不是一切都能得到諒解了呢?」當時的我這麼想著。
畢竟活著也沒什麼好事了，甚至是只剩下無盡的痛苦，與煎熬。
離邊緣越來越近，兩步，一步——
「吶，妳在做什麼呢?」
妳的聲音就這樣突然在這時從我背後傳來。
隨後我就感覺到有人環抱住我的腹部，並把我往後拉，直到離頂樓邊緣大約十步的地方。
我不知為何不太想反抗，或許是沒意識到發生了什麼事，又或許是我早已忘了何謂反抗。
明明那股力氣並不大，我卻溫順地聽從了妳的動作。
直到你停下，我回頭看向妳。
在雪花不斷飄落的情境中，妳對我展露了笑容。
那份光景我直到現在仍歷歷在目。
那時妳讓我找到了人生不止於此的理由，或許我沒有找到活著的意義，但至少我沒有去死的理由。

「答應我，要好好品嚐人生的各種情緒。或許快樂，或許悲傷，或許慍怒，或許驚訝——無論如何，活下去，好嗎?」
那時妳是這麼對我說的。
我沒有用言語回覆，僅僅是默默點了點頭。
而後雖然沒有必要，我們兩人開始有了聯繫。
從陌生人，到朋友，到知己，甚至最後有了更親密的關係。
我的眼中從黯淡無光，也漸漸開始有了光芒，有了希望。
不過因為妳家人的因素，我們之間發生的事一直是兩人的秘密。
畢竟這年頭同性情感還是有些人不予認同嘛，這也難怪。
 
某次我們在路邊的陰暗角落熱吻過後，妳突然問我: 
「現在，妳找到自己能獨自活下去的動力了嗎?」 
我沒有多想，只是自信地點頭。
因為我確實找到了活下去的動力。
那就是，和妳在一起。
然而該自怨是我國文太爛嗎? 我當初竟疏忽了「獨自」二字。
所以沒有多想的我只有一昧地點頭。
「這樣啊，那真是太好了...呢。」
妳這麼說著，言語上理應是高興的，但眼神卻黯淡了幾分，更加融入了街道角落的色彩。
然而，我再一次地沒發覺。
被幸福沖昏了頭可真是件恐怖的事呢。
「那，再見囉，凜。」
隨後妳變默默走上了大街，消失了蹤影。
平常就神出鬼沒的妳，何時突然消失我都不意外了。
因為我知道妳總有一天會再出現在我身邊。
不過，那天回想起來。
妳第一次叫了我的名字。
明明我們是同性伴侶，我們卻從來沒叫過對方名字。
因為我們也不知道彼此名字，彼此之間的愛也不必用這種代名詞就能傳達。

然而自那天後，一個星期，兩個月，三年——
妳就像不曾存在般，消失得無影無蹤。
我一直等著，一直，等候著。
努力地活著，盡情地活著。
只願我的所作為能滿足你的問句。
然後過了那麼久——
終於聽說了妳的消息後——
為何，我現在只能站在一塊刻著字的灰色墓碑前回想這些呢?
為何我只能在大雪紛飛之時獨自站在這裡呢?
為何我不由自主地流下了眼淚呢?
為何——你就這樣自私地離去了呢?
為何那句一如往常的再見，居然如此漫長呢?
看著面前的墓碑上寫著的名字。
流著淚的我只是對著墓碑開了口:
「那，再見了，雪月。」
是啊，再見了，真的——再也見不到了。

流下的淚在提醒著我。
提醒著我仍活著，提醒我活著是如此痛苦，如此煎熬。
如果讓我活下去的動力已經不復存在，那既然如此，我又何必活著呢?
這麼想著的我，不知不覺走到了當初的那個校舍頂樓。
走上頂樓的同時，我發現這處有別的訪客。
一名少女站在離邊緣大概三步的地方，背對著在樓梯口的我。
我當下沒有想什麼，只是靜靜地走近。
她默默地往前走了一步，又一步。
我知道我該做什麼，也知道會發生什麼事。
但我仍在此時開了口——
「吶，妳在做什麼呢?」
